questions.question: Compare feedforward, convolutional, and recurrent neural networks.
keyPoints: FNN: no cycles, general-purpose, fully connected
CNN: weight sharing, spatial feature detection, for images
RNN: feedback loops, memory, for sequential data
Each suited for different data types and problem domains

questions.question: Explain the architecture and working of LSTM networks.
keyPoints: Input gate controls new information addition
Output gate controls what is passed forward
Solves vanishing gradient in long sequences

questions.question: Describe Self-Organizing Maps and their applications.
keyPoints: Maps high-dimensional data to low-dimensional grid

questions.question: Explain the concept of GANs and how adversarial training works.
